prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of ZTS stock, I used historical volatility analysis. Large-cap pharmaceutical stocks like Zoetis typically have daily volatility around 1.5-2%. The point estimate assumes no significant directional bias over such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals are constructed using approximately 1 standard deviation (50% CI), 1.28 standard deviations (80% CI), and 1.65 standard deviations (90% CI) based on estimated daily volatility of ~1.5%.
